calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-033 E2_harm_s ablation on SD-022 body-damage substrate
items.note: Direct ablation of E2_harm_s on the SD-022 body-damage substrate (limb_damage_enabled=True; z_harm_s and z_harm_a structurally independent per EXQ-241b). ARM_A: use_e2_harm_s_forward=True with SD-013 interventional loss. ARM_B: world-stream E2 counterfactual stand-in (architectural prediction is collapse on harm-driven events under SD-010 perpendicularity). Metric: attribution_snr = cf_gap_event / cf_gap_quiet (event = delta_harm>=0.05 step). PASS: C1 ARM_A snr>=1.5, C2 ARM_B snr<=1.2, C3 ratio>=1.5. Tests the strong-reading 'E2_harm_s necessary' subset. Recent ARC-058 lit (Wager 2013, Hofbauer 2001) is weakening the claim via somatic/affective dissociation; this experiment provides the falsifiable substrate test. Smoke 2026-05-03T01:43Z: --dry-run runs in 3s; ARM_A snr=1.43, ARM_B snr=1.18 even at 2 warmup eps -- promising substrate signal.
